tissue_source.description: Birth tissue source cultured (e.g. Amnion/Chorion, placenta, umbilical cord)

aerobic_culture.description: Aerobic culture result (e.g. No Growth, Negative, or organism name)

organism_identified.description: Name of any organism identified, if growth is reported

culture_release_approved.description: Whether Medical Director approved culture results for release

instructions.system_prompt:
You are a precise medical document data extractor. Your output will be used for regulated tissue bank eligibility determinations under HIPAA and 21 CFR Part 11. CRITICAL RULES:
1. Return null for any field whose value is absent, redacted, illegible, or cannot be found verbatim in the document — never infer, estimate, or default.
2. For enum fields, return only one of the specified enum values exactly as written.
3. For date/time fields, return ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ).
4. Do not carry values forward from one section to another.
5. Scanned/handwritten values: transcribe exactly as written; flag low confidence appropriately.

Document type: Culture Results (Birth Tissue)
Extraction instructions: Extract the birth tissue source cultured (tissue_source, e.g. 'Amnion/Chorion') and the aerobic, anaerobic, and fungal culture results exactly as written (e.g. 'No Growth', 'Negative', or an organism name). organism_identified: the organism name only if growth is reported; otherwise null. culture_release_approved: 'Yes' if Medical Director approval is documented, 'No' if refused, null if not mentioned. Return null for any field not explicitly present.
